EMPIRICAL RESOLUTION for #32 (read hag/tools/similarity/sonic_discovery.py). The pgvector matching vector sonic7_v1 = [energy, bpm, danceability, party, happy, aggressive, relaxed]. energy=MIK, bpm=Rekordbox — but the other 5 (danceability/party/happy/aggressive/relaxed) are canonical ESSENTIA mood-model outputs; MIK/Rekordbox/Apple MU produce NONE of them. So 5/7 similarity dims are Essentia's => 'Essentia obsolete' is FALSE for matching, and this VINDICATES §A.1 (native Essentia on the masters populates exactly these). Recommended resolution: KEEP Essentia, SCOPED to mood/danceability (+embeddings/genre); retire it only for scalars owned better elsewhere (energy→MIK, key→MIK, bpm→Rekordbox, structure→Apple MU). Caveat to verify: matcher READS the mood cols; the current WRITER wasn't found in-repo (no .pb/TensorflowPredict outside venvs) — confirm mood values are live-regenerated by Essentia vs persisted, which sets the coverage action.
